prediction.reasoning:
As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor can I perform fundamental or technical analysis, or access specific news or events that might impact ACN's price. Therefore, I cannot make a true financial prediction.

The point estimate is set to the current price ($201.18), as this is the most neutral prediction without any specific directional information or a predictive model. Any deviation would imply predictive capabilities I do not possess.

To construct the confidence intervals, I've used a generalized statistical approach assuming a constant drift of zero (i.e., the price on average doesn't move) and a simplified volatility model. I have assumed an annualized stock volatility of approximately 22% for ACN (a reasonable general proxy for a large-cap stock). This annual volatility is scaled for the 18-day period.

These intervals represent a theoretical range where the price might fall with the specified probability, based purely on historical volatility patterns and not on any forward-looking market intelligence. They do not account for company-specific news, economic reports, market sentiment shifts, or any other real-world factors that heavily influence stock prices.
